useCases.title: 30-60-90 plan generator
useCases.summary: LLM tailors ramp goals to role, level, and manager input from a structured template.

useCases.title: Account reconciliation agent
useCases.summary: Auto-matches GL to bank and sub-ledger feeds and surfaces only true exceptions, using tools like BlackLine, FloQast, or Numeric.

useCases.title: Accrual auto-suggestion
useCases.summary: LLM proposes period-end accruals from open POs, contracts, and prior patterns.

useCases.title: Adaptive dunning sequences
useCases.summary: LLM tailors tone, channel, and timing per customer payment history, using tools like Gaviti or Chaser AI.

useCases.title: Adversarial cull-check
useCases.summary: Re-score sample of dropped candidates with an "advocate" LLM persona

useCases.title: Agent expertise graph
useCases.summary: An auto-built knowledge graph links agents to topics they have successfully resolved and uses those links as routing input.

useCases.title: Agentic competitor monitoring
useCases.summary: Continuously scrape and diff competitor sites, pricing, and messaging with change alerts, using tools like Crayon, Klue, or Visualping.

useCases.title: Agentic cross-platform deployment
useCases.summary: An agent pushes campaigns into Meta, Google, and LinkedIn via API from a single brief.

useCases.title: AI-conducted exit interview
useCases.summary: Chatbot runs adaptive exit conversations with follow-up probes, capturing fuller signal than free-text surveys.

useCases.title: Agentic Engineering
useCases.summary: Agentic engineering lets AI draft, refactor, and explain code for you, with the strongest results on boilerplate, repetitive implementation, and well-scoped changes that you can still review and maintain.

useCases.title: AI inbound chat qualifier
useCases.summary: An adaptive bot replaces static forms and qualifies website visitors in real time, using tools like Qualified or Drift.

useCases.title: AI-moderated qualitative interviews
useCases.summary: An LLM conducts and synthesizes hundreds of customer interviews on demand, using tools like Listen Labs or Outset.

useCases.title: AI personal tutor
useCases.summary: Adaptive one-on-one explanations, Socratic dialogue, and just-in-time answers support employees inside learning content.

useCases.title: AI roleplay skill coach
useCases.summary: Simulated customer or colleague scenarios let new hires practice difficult conversations with structured feedback.

useCases.title: AI screening interviews
useCases.summary: Voice or chat agent conducts adaptive first-round interviews and scores responses against the role rubric.

useCases.title: Anomaly root-cause explanations
useCases.summary: An LLM cross-references data sources to explain why CPA, CAC, or ROAS shifted.

useCases.title: ASC 606 revenue recognition split
useCases.summary: LLM applies rev-rec rules to multi-element arrangements and posts the schedule.

useCases.title: Async video interview analysis
useCases.summary: Transcribes one-way video answers and scores responses against a competency rubric for high-volume roles.

useCases.title: ATS candidate rediscovery
useCases.summary: Re-ranks past applicants in the existing ATS against new requisitions using embedding similarity.

useCases.title: Attrition root-cause attribution
useCases.summary: Links exits to manager, team, compensation, and role signals to attribute drivers quantitatively rather than anecdotally.

useCases.title: Audience-tailored briefs
useCases.summary: One corpus into exec, technical, operational versions; caveats unhideable

useCases.title: Auto-bidding and budget pacing
useCases.summary: Platform-native machine learning optimizes bids and pacing toward conversion goals, using tools like Google Performance Max or Meta Advantage+.

useCases.title: Auto-drafted proposal
useCases.summary: AI generates SOWs and proposals from CRM opportunity data using approved templates, with tools like PandaDoc AI or Proposify.

useCases.title: Auto-drafted success plan
useCases.summary: AI generates a 30/60/90 outcome plan from discovery and ROI commitments.

useCases.title: Auto-generated campaign briefs
useCases.summary: An LLM turns research and goals into a structured campaign brief with KPIs, audiences, and channels.

useCases.title: Auto-generated QBR
useCases.summary: AI synthesizes usage, value delivered, and expansion vectors into a business-review deck, using tools like Gainsight Horizon AI.

useCases.title: Auto-generated review decks
useCases.summary: An agent assembles performance review slide decks from connected data sources, using tools like Plus or Rows.

useCases.title: Auto-knockout filter
useCases.summary: Rules engine rejects candidates failing hard criteria before LLM scoring

useCases.title: Auto-narrative performance reports
useCases.summary: An LLM writes monthly and quarterly marketing narratives directly from KPI data, using tools like Tableau Pulse.

useCases.title: Auto-renew and anomaly detector
useCases.summary: AI flags auto-renew clauses, price bumps, and missed renewal windows in the contract corpus, using tools like Sirion or LinkSquares.

useCases.title: Automated incrementality experiments
useCases.summary: Geo holdouts and ghost-ad designs run continuously to prove causation rather than correlation, using tools like Measured or Haus.

useCases.title: Autonomous BDR agent
useCases.summary: An end-to-end agent runs prospecting, enrichment, outreach, and meeting booking without rep involvement, using tools like Artisan Ava or 11x.

useCases.title: Autonomous deep research briefs
useCases.summary: An agent reviews hundreds of web sources and turns them into a cited category, audience, or competitor brief, using tools like Perplexity Deep Research or ChatGPT.

useCases.title: Autonomous diagnostic agent
useCases.summary: An agent calls logs, billing, status, and product APIs to gather facts and produce a structured diagnosis.

useCases.title: Autonomous resolution agent
useCases.summary: An agent executes refunds, password resets, and account updates end-to-end without human handoff, using tools like Fini, Intercom Fin, or Ada.

useCases.title: Background-check risk extraction
useCases.summary: Parses background-check returns, summarizes adverse data, and flags items needing recruiter review.

useCases.title: Bar-setter from prior decisions
useCases.summary: Surface historical decisions and outcomes from internal archive; reveal implicit bar past calls applied

useCases.title: Behavioral audience segment discovery
useCases.summary: Clustering on CRM and CDP data surfaces high-value audience segments and look-alikes.

useCases.title: AI assistants
useCases.summary: AI assistants are the starting point for most workplace AI adoption: use them to brainstorm, challenge ideas, analyze questions, draft text, and build judgment by comparing responses across tools.

useCases.title: Board-pack narrative draft
useCases.summary: LLM writes MD&A-style commentary from numbers and KPIs for executive review, using tools like Vena Copilot.

useCases.title: Brand-grounded copy generation
useCases.summary: A RAG-grounded LLM produces blog, email, and ad copy in a trained brand voice, using tools like Writer, Jasper, or Anyword.

useCases.title: Budget anomaly flagging
useCases.summary: ML detects line items deviating from prior-period patterns and seasonality, using tools like Datarails or Vena Copilot.

useCases.title: Bug-cluster handoff to engineering
useCases.summary: Recurring root-cause clusters are auto-filed as Jira tickets with linked customer evidence and reproduction notes.

useCases.title: Buying-committee mapping
useCases.summary: NLP and graph analysis identify decision-makers, champions, and blockers across the account, using tools like People.ai.

useCases.title: Buying-signal trigger monitoring
useCases.summary: An agent watches job changes, funding rounds, and hiring spikes, then alerts reps in real time with tools like Common Room or UserGems.

useCases.title: Calibration bias detector
useCases.summary: Compares ratings across managers and demographic groups, flagging drift and inconsistency before calibration meetings.

useCases.title: Calibration tracker
useCases.summary: Tracks each rater's scores against final outcomes over rounds; surfaces systematic over/underrating

useCases.title: Capacity and headcount optimizer
useCases.summary: Linear optimization plus ML balances hiring schedules against output and cost targets.

useCases.title: Capex vs opex classifier
useCases.summary: LLM classifies spend requests against accounting policy and cites the rule applied.

useCases.title: Case-study retrieval RAG
useCases.summary: Retrieval-augmented generation pulls vertical-matched proof points from the sales-asset library on demand, using tools like Highspot or Seismic.

useCases.title: Cash application via remittance parsing
useCases.summary: Extraction parses remittance from email, PDF, and EDI and matches to open invoices, using tools like HighRadius or Artsyl docAlpha.

useCases.title: Champion-departure monitoring
useCases.summary: AI detects when the primary contact leaves the account and triggers a retention play, using tools like Champify or UserGems.

useCases.title: Channel-level marketing mix modeling
useCases.summary: Bayesian marketing mix modeling proves channel lift, including offline and zero-click channels, using tools like Rockerbox or Meridian.

useCases.title: Churn-risk and VIP flagging
useCases.summary: A predictive model surfaces revenue-at-risk, VIP, or expansion-sensitive tickets for fast-track handling.

useCases.title: Churn-risk prediction model
useCases.summary: Multi-signal machine learning scores accounts on usage, sentiment, and ticket trends 90 days before renewal, using tools like ChurnZero, Gainsight, or Velaris.

useCases.title: Claim-grounded source verifier
useCases.summary: For each claim, identify cited passage; flag where citation doesn't support claim

useCases.title: Clause precedent retrieval
useCases.summary: Retrieval-augmented generation over signed contracts surfaces approved language and precedent for tricky asks, using tools like Ironclad or Sirion.

useCases.title: Code and config snippet generation
useCases.summary: An LLM produces a config or code patch for technical tickets, grounded in the customer's stack and product documentation.

useCases.title: Code-grounded quant red-team
useCases.summary: Runs alternative parameterisations against the actual model; reports where conclusions flip

useCases.title: Comp recommendation per offer
useCases.summary: Synthesizes market benchmarks, internal equity, and band guardrails into a defensible offer range.

useCases.title: Comparison matrix auto-fill
useCases.summary: Define columns once; LLM fills cells from each source

useCases.title: Compensation flight-risk model
useCases.summary: Identifies high performers paid below market and recommends proactive adjustments before resignation.

useCases.title: Contact-driver and trend analytics
useCases.summary: Topic clustering across closed tickets surfaces emerging contact reasons and demand shifts, using tools like SentiSum.

useCases.title: Continuous pay-equity monitoring
useCases.summary: Model recalculates adjusted pay gap across protected groups on every pay change and flags outliers for remediation.

useCases.title: Continuous source monitor
useCases.summary: Watch defined sources and push new candidates into intake

useCases.title: Continuous workforce model
useCases.summary: Agent recalculates the workforce plan automatically when finance updates revenue, attrition, or product roadmap inputs.

useCases.title: Contract clause review
useCases.summary: LLM compares vendor or amended employment contracts against approved policy and flags deviations.

useCases.title: Contract redline AI
useCases.summary: AI auto-redlines counterparty edits against the negotiation playbook and flags risk clauses, using tools like Spellbook, Sirion, or Ironclad.

useCases.title: Contract review for revenue and lease audit
useCases.summary: LLM extracts and tests key terms against accounting treatment across full contract population, using tools like Trullion or Kira.

useCases.title: Contract-to-invoice generation
useCases.summary: LLM extracts billing terms from signed MSAs and drafts invoice schedules, using tools like Tabs.

useCases.title: Control-evidence retrieval agent
useCases.summary: Agent pulls evidence from connected systems on demand for control tests and walkthroughs, using tools like AuditBoard.

useCases.title: Conversational career site agent
useCases.summary: Chatbot answers candidate questions, captures applications, and pre-screens via web chat or messaging apps.

useCases.title: Conversational financial Q&A
useCases.summary: Natural-language interface returns drilldowns and explanations from the financial model, using tools like Cube AI Analyst or Datarails Genius.

useCases.title: Conversational reporting in Slack
useCases.summary: A bot answers ad-hoc KPI questions and posts daily summaries in chat.

useCases.title: Conversational slot-filling intake
useCases.summary: An LLM agent asks targeted follow-up questions to populate required ticket fields before submission, using tools like Intercom Fin or Ada.

useCases.title: Creative-attribute performance attribution
useCases.summary: Vision and LLM systems tag creative attributes and link them to spend efficiency.

useCases.title: Criteria stress-tester
useCases.summary: LLM critiques proposed criteria for gameability, overlap, missing dimensions

useCases.title: Cross-system handoff agent
useCases.summary: An agent transfers opportunity context, contacts, and notes from the CRM to the CS platform, using tools like Gainsight Horizon AI or Vitally AI.

useCases.title: Customer 360 context auto-attach
useCases.summary: An agent pulls CRM, order history, plan data, and recent tickets into the ticket as structured context at intake.

useCases.title: Customer cohort LTV segmentation
useCases.summary: Embeddings cluster customers by behavior to feed differentiated retention and revenue assumptions.

useCases.title: Customer-reply intent classifier
useCases.summary: A classifier labels follow-up replies as resolved, not resolved, or unclear so the queue can advance automatically.

useCases.title: Customer review and social mining
useCases.summary: Embeddings cluster reviews, social posts, and forum threads into ranked customer pain points and themes, using tools like Brandwatch.

useCases.title: Data-driven multi-touch attribution
useCases.summary: Machine learning assigns conversion credit across user-level touchpoints instead of relying on rule-based models, using tools like Cometly or Dreamdata.

useCases.title: Data enrichment
useCases.summary: AI data enrichment adds generated classifications, summaries, extracted fields, cleanup, or missing context to spreadsheet rows when manual review is slowing down the work.

useCases.title: Deal risk scoring
useCases.summary: Machine learning flags slipping deals from email tone, call sentiment, and engagement decay, using tools like Aviso or Clari Copilot.

useCases.title: Decision capture + disagreement extraction
useCases.summary: Record meeting; extract which assumption each side rests on, what evidence resolves it

useCases.title: Decomposed-criteria scorer
useCases.summary: Score each candidate on each sub-criterion independently, then recombine

useCases.title: Dictation AIs
useCases.summary: Dictation AIs turn speech into working text when speaking is faster than typing, especially for drafting, communication, accessibility needs, or getting past a blank page.

useCases.title: Disagreement flagger + pre-meeting brief
useCases.summary: Surface high-variance candidates; brief on divergence and questions to resolve

useCases.title: Discovery gap analyzer
useCases.summary: An adversarial pass over transcripts highlights pain points the rep failed to probe.

useCases.title: Dispute-likelihood scoring
useCases.summary: ML predicts which invoices will be challenged based on customer and line-item history.

useCases.title: Disqualification recommender
useCases.summary: An adversarial review flags unfit deals with rationale before reps invest more cycles.

useCases.title: Domain-specific discovery
useCases.summary: Semantic search over the right corpus (Elicit/Consensus, Exa, Research Rabbit)

useCases.title: Driver-tree assumption suggestions
useCases.summary: LLM proposes drivers and ranges from prior models and benchmarks.

useCases.title: Duplicate and fraud detection
useCases.summary: ML flags duplicates, mismatched bank details, and vendor impersonation patterns, using tools like AppZen or Trustpair.

useCases.title: Duplicate and incident-wave detection
useCases.summary: Embedding similarity flags new tickets that match active incidents or duplicate reports at the moment of intake.

useCases.title: Dynamic creative optimization
useCases.summary: Auto-assemble personalized ad variants per audience and placement, using tools like Smartly or Meta Advantage+.

useCases.title: Earnings Q&A simulator
useCases.summary: LLM red-teams analyst questions on the numbers and drafts response talking points.

useCases.title: Embedding-based deduplication
useCases.summary: Vector similarity to merge near-duplicates and aliases

useCases.title: ESG disclosure draft
useCases.summary: LLM compiles CSRD and SEC climate reports from operational and financial source data.

useCases.title: Exit interview thematic analysis
useCases.summary: NLP clusters reasons across hundreds of exit interviews into ranked themes by team, manager, and tenure.

useCases.title: Expert finder
useCases.summary: Surfaces named experts from publications, citations, conference talks, LinkedIn relevant to the deep-dive

useCases.title: Forecasting tournament on outcomes
useCases.summary: Registered forecasts on 12/24-month outcomes; scored when they resolve

useCases.title: Full-population transaction risk scoring
useCases.summary: ML scores 100% of journal entries and transactions, replacing sampling-based testing, using tools like MindBridge or EY Helix.

useCases.title: Generative ad creative production
useCases.summary: Text-to-image and text-to-video tools produce social and display ads at variant scale, using tools like Midjourney, Runway, or Pencil.

useCases.title: GL coding suggestion
useCases.summary: LLM proposes coding from vendor, memo, and prior history, using tools like Ramp or Brex.

useCases.title: Granular topic auto-tagging
useCases.summary: An LLM applies fine-grained topic tags so support analytics stay consistent across the full ticket corpus, using tools like SentiSum.

useCases.title: Grey-literature + practitioner sweep
useCases.summary: Targeted sweep of practitioner reports, registries, retractions

useCases.title: Headcount scenario builder
useCases.summary: Natural-language prompt generates costed headcount plans linked to revenue forecast, with side-by-side scenario comparison.

useCases.title: Hiring decision bias audit
useCases.summary: Adversarial model reviews offer and reject patterns by demographic group, surfacing drift before regulatory or reputational exposure.

useCases.title: Hyper-personalized outbound copy
useCases.summary: An LLM drafts cold openers grounded in a prospect's recent posts, podcasts, or filings, using tools like Lavender or Smartwriter.

useCases.title: Hypothesis tree + criteria translator
useCases.summary: Convert one-paragraph brief into MECE hypothesis tree and quantifiable screening criteria

useCases.title: ICP lookalike account discovery
useCases.summary: Embedding search over firmographic data finds accounts matching the closed-won profile, using tools like Clay or 6sense.

useCases.title: Identity-resolved audience activation
useCases.summary: First-party identity resolution syncs lookalikes, suppressions, and CRM segments to ad platforms, using tools like Hightouch or LayerFive.

useCases.title: Implementation feedback loop
useCases.summary: Structured check-ins with recipient: what was validated, what was wrong, synthesised back into KB

useCases.title: Implementation risk flagger
useCases.summary: Machine learning predicts onboarding risk based on sales-stage signals like buying-team turnover.

useCases.title: Inclusive job description optimizer
useCases.summary: LLM rewrites job postings for inclusive language, readability, and conversion.

useCases.title: Intent and category classification
useCases.summary: A fine-tuned classifier or LLM assigns category labels that drive downstream routing, using tools like Zendesk Intelligent Triage or SentiSum.

useCases.title: Intercompany elimination matching
useCases.summary: Agent matches intercompany entries across entities and currencies and posts eliminations.

useCases.title: Internal mobility supply forecaster
useCases.summary: Predicts which existing employees will be ready for upcoming open roles, reducing external hiring demand.

useCases.title: Internal opportunity matcher
useCases.summary: Pushes open roles, gigs, and stretch projects to employees ranked by skills fit and career goals.

useCases.title: Interview prep + transcription + synthesis
useCases.summary: Per expert: generate tailored question set from deep-dive draft. Post-interview: auto-transcribe, synthesise themes across many interviews, surface quotes per theme with source link

useCases.title: Invoice OCR and extraction
useCases.summary: Vision plus LLM extracts header and line items from PDF and email invoices, using tools like Vic.ai, Stampli, or Docsumo.

useCases.title: Invoice pre-flight check
useCases.summary: LLM catches PO mismatches, missing fields, and currency errors before send.

useCases.title: Journal entry anomaly detection
useCases.summary: ML flags journal entries by round numbers, late posting, unusual GL combinations, and user behavior.

useCases.title: KB article generation from resolutions
useCases.summary: An LLM drafts a new knowledge-base article when a solved ticket has no reusable help content.

useCases.title: KB-grounded draft reply
useCases.summary: An LLM drafts a customer response grounded in knowledge-base sources, using tools like Zendesk Generative AI or Intercom Fin.

useCases.title: Knowledge capture agent
useCases.summary: Summarizes a leaver's docs, decisions, and key contacts into a structured handover for the successor.

useCases.title: KPI auto-insights detection
useCases.summary: Machine learning surfaces top week-over-week KPI changes and ranks them by business impact.

useCases.title: Language and timezone routing
useCases.summary: A classifier detects the customer's language and aligns routing with agent language coverage and timezone availability.

useCases.title: Last-mile deal coaching
useCases.summary: AI surfaces deal-specific risk and a recommended next step for the AE and manager, using tools like Aviso or Clari Copilot.

useCases.title: Lease accounting agent
useCases.summary: LLM extracts lease terms, computes ASC 842 and IFRS 16 schedules, and posts entries, using tools like Trullion.

useCases.title: Live interview copilot
useCases.summary: Real-time transcription provides question prompts and structured note-taking during interviewer-led sessions.

useCases.title: Live market benchmarking
useCases.summary: Real-time job-posting and salary feeds set ranges per role and geography continuously rather than annually.

useCases.title: Live objection-response prompts
useCases.summary: AI surfaces real-time rebuttals during pricing and competitive pushback on calls, using tools like Cresta or Balto.

useCases.title: Living-document refresh trigger
useCases.summary: Periodically re-run key claims against new evidence; flag when conclusions go stale

useCases.title: LLM-scored QA on every ticket
useCases.summary: An LLM scores every closed ticket against a quality rubric, replacing manual sampling with full-coverage QA.

useCases.title: Localized offer letter generation
useCases.summary: LLM drafts country-specific offer letters with required clauses from a template library.

useCases.title: Log and stack-trace summarization
useCases.summary: An LLM compresses attached logs into ranked root-cause hypotheses for the support agent.

useCases.title: Manager briefing generator
useCases.summary: LLM produces a one-pager on the new hire background and suggested first-meeting agenda from public profile and resume.

useCases.title: Marketing-mix budget modeling
useCases.summary: Causal marketing mix modeling forecasts channel ROI to set budget splits before launch, using tools like Northbeam, Robyn, or Meridian.

useCases.title: MEDDIC auto-extraction
useCases.summary: An LLM extracts metrics, champion, pain, and decision criteria from calls and emails into CRM fields, using tools like Gong or Aviso.

useCases.title: Meeting transcription
useCases.summary: Meeting transcription turns conversations into transcripts, notes, summaries, and action lists when a searchable written record is worth the consent, policy, and cleanup overhead.

useCases.title: Merit cycle agent
useCases.summary: Drafts manager-level compensation recommendations within budget, equity, and band guardrails, with explanations.

useCases.title: Methodology compliance + completeness check
useCases.summary: LLM checks deep-dive against declared protocol (PRISMA, pre-reg, stated rubric); flags missing sections and unjustified deviations

useCases.title: Methodology scorecard
useCases.summary: An LLM scores calls against MEDDPICC, SPIN, or Sandler frameworks, using tools like Hyperbound.

useCases.title: ML rolling revenue forecast
useCases.summary: Multivariate ML projects revenue from CRM pipeline, historicals, and external signals, using tools like Anaplan PlanIQ, Pigment, or Runway.

useCases.title: Multi-agent adversarial review
useCases.summary: Combines falsification prompts, heterogeneous personas (skeptical methodologist, domain expert, base-rate thinker), and Hypothesis-Verifier-Quantifier pipelines. Single architecture, multiple configurations depending on depth needed

useCases.title: Multi-channel intent normalization
useCases.summary: An LLM converts email, chat, voice, and social messages into a unified ticket schema with extracted entities, using tools like Zendesk Intelligent Triage or Kustomer.

useCases.title: Multi-engine deep research
useCases.summary: Same query through ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude Deep Research; merge results

useCases.title: Multi-source semantic candidate search
useCases.summary: AI search across open-web profiles ranks candidates by skills, trajectory, and fit beyond keyword matching.

useCases.title: Multi-step workflow orchestration
useCases.summary: An agent chains a refund, replacement order, and apology email into a single governed resolution path.

useCases.title: Multilingual transcreation
useCases.summary: Neural translation plus brand-tone adaptation localizes campaigns across markets, using tools like DeepL or Smartling.

useCases.title: Natural-language analytics agent
useCases.summary: An LLM answers ad-hoc performance questions over the warehouse without SQL, using tools like Tableau Pulse or Cortex Analyst.

useCases.title: Natural-language scenario generation
useCases.summary: LLM agent rebuilds scenario branches from prompts like "model 15% EMEA cut", using tools like Runway or Pigment.

useCases.title: Negotiation role-play simulator
useCases.summary: An AI buyer bot lets reps rehearse tough objections before live calls, using tools like Hyperbound or Second Nature.

useCases.title: New-hire conversational assistant
useCases.summary: RAG agent over policy, benefits, and IT docs deflects routine HR tickets during the first 90 days.

useCases.title: Offer-acceptance probability model
useCases.summary: Predicts close rate per offer from candidate behavior, compensation delta, and pipeline history to prioritize recruiter effort.

useCases.title: Open-question packager
useCases.summary: Extract unresolved uncertainties; package each as actionable research brief

useCases.title: Outcome-linked prior-art retrieval
useCases.summary: Retrieve prior internal work, with the decision and what happened next

useCases.title: Payment-date prediction
useCases.summary: ML predicts pay date per invoice and sets cadence, using tools like Tesorio or HighRadius.

useCases.title: Payment timing optimizer
useCases.summary: Agent times runs to capture early-pay discounts against working-capital position, using tools like Glean.ai.

useCases.title: Performance review draft generator
useCases.summary: LLM synthesizes peer comments, goals, and self-assessment into a manager review draft.

useCases.title: Personalized demo video
useCases.summary: AI generates tailored video walkthroughs per prospect using an avatar or product clips, with tools like Tavus or HeyGen.

useCases.title: Personalized outreach sequence generator
useCases.summary: LLM drafts cold messages tailored to each candidate profile and role context with multi-touch sequencing.

useCases.title: Personalized total-rewards statement
useCases.summary: LLM generates per-employee narrative covering base pay, equity, benefits, and growth in pay over time.

useCases.title: Post-call summary and CRM auto-update
useCases.summary: Transcripts are condensed into structured fields and pushed to the CRM without rep input, using tools like Gong, Read.ai, or Avoma.

useCases.title: Pre-call account briefing
useCases.summary: AI synthesizes 10-Ks, news, and LinkedIn data into a one-page brief before each meeting.

useCases.title: Pre-flight creative and compliance QA
useCases.summary: Vision and text classifiers screen creatives for brand, claim, and accessibility issues before publish, using tools like CreativeX.

useCases.title: Pre-meeting steelman pair
useCases.summary: Per finalist: strongest case for and against, distributed before meeting

useCases.title: Pre-mortem generator
useCases.summary: "Imagine this round produced a useless answer, what went wrong?" Multi-persona prompt

useCases.title: Predictive attrition forecasting
useCases.summary: ML model on tenure, engagement, compensation, and promotion velocity flags flight risk 3-6 months ahead at role and cohort level.

useCases.title: Predictive best-agent routing
useCases.summary: An ML model predicts likelihood of resolution per agent for the current ticket and routes accordingly.

useCases.title: Predictive content performance scoring
useCases.summary: Machine learning ranks topic and format ideas by predicted reach and conversion, using tools like MarketMuse.

useCases.title: Predictive SQL conversion score
useCases.summary: Machine learning ranks leads by probability of becoming a sales-qualified opportunity, using tools like MadKudu or Einstein.

useCases.title: Pricing recommendation engine
useCases.summary: Machine learning suggests price and discount levels by segment, deal size, and historical win rates, using tools like Pricefx or DealHub.

useCases.title: Probabilistic decision register
useCases.summary: Capture decisions as probability distributions, not binary

useCases.title: Probabilistic forecast roll-up
useCases.summary: AI replaces gut-feel forecasts with data-driven deal probability and ARR-weighted commit, using tools like Clari, Aviso, or BoostUp.

useCases.title: Promise-to-pay tracker
useCases.summary: LLM detects pay promises in email threads, monitors fulfillment, and escalates on miss.

useCases.title: Promised-commitments extractor
useCases.summary: AI pulls every promised commitment from sales transcripts to prevent broken promises in delivery.

useCases.title: Real-time call coaching
useCases.summary: In-call prompts surface missed questions, objections, and battle cards as the conversation happens, using tools like Cresta or Balto.

useCases.title: Real-time launch anomaly detection
useCases.summary: Machine learning flags broken pixels, spend spikes, and CTR collapse within hours of launch, using tools like Anodot.

useCases.title: Reallocation agent during cuts
useCases.summary: Constrained optimizer proposes which lines to cut to hit a target with minimum operational impact.

useCases.title: Regrettable-attrition classifier
useCases.summary: Auto-labels exits as regrettable or non-regrettable using performance, role criticality, and replacement-cost data.

useCases.title: Reopen-risk prediction
useCases.summary: A predictive model flags closed-pending tickets that are likely to reopen so agents can proactively follow up.

useCases.title: Reproducibility probe agent
useCases.summary: An agent attempts to reproduce the reported issue against a test account or API to confirm the failure mode.

useCases.title: Resolution-confirmation message generator
useCases.summary: An LLM drafts a targeted follow-up asking whether the issue is resolved.

useCases.title: Vibe-Coding Slides
useCases.summary: Vibe-coding slides means using AI tools to create presentation decks quickly, especially when the format is changing and speed matters more than a heavily designed slide workflow.

useCases.title: Risk-tiered prioritization
useCases.summary: Agent ranks accounts by recovery probability multiplied by exposure, using tools like HighRadius.

useCases.title: ROI business case generator
useCases.summary: AI builds a quantified value model and CFO narrative from discovery inputs, using tools like Cuvama or Vivun.

useCases.title: Role-based learning auto-assignment
useCases.summary: LMS matches courses to inferred skill gaps and role requirements without manual curation.

useCases.title: Root-cause clustering across tickets
useCases.summary: Embedding clustering groups tickets that share an underlying defect so support can batch analysis, updates, and escalation.

useCases.title: Sales-call competitive intelligence
useCases.summary: Mine call transcripts for competitor mentions, objections, and win-loss drivers, using tools like Gong or Klue.

useCases.title: Sales-to-CS handoff briefing
useCases.summary: AI synthesizes discovery, proposal, and commitments into an onboarding document for the CS team, using tools like Gong or Read.ai.

useCases.title: Save-play recommender
useCases.summary: AI retrieves successful retention playbooks from past saves matched to the current risk pattern.

useCases.title: Screenshot and log artifact parser
useCases.summary: A vision model reads attached screenshots and stack traces to extract error codes, product context, and likely failure areas before an agent opens the ticket.

useCases.title: Searchable cross-round repository
useCases.summary: Embedding-based search across all decision artifacts with grounded answers

useCases.title: Security and RFP auto-responder
useCases.summary: Retrieval-augmented generation fills security questionnaires and RFPs from an approved knowledge base, using tools like Loopio, Vendict, or Responsive.

useCases.title: Sensitivity-driven research scoper
useCases.summary: Ranks which inputs would most reduce decision uncertainty

useCases.title: Sentiment-driven priority scoring
useCases.summary: A model combines sentiment, customer tier, and language cues into a priority score, using tools like SentiSum or Kustomer.

useCases.title: Signed-contract data extraction
useCases.summary: AI pulls ARR, term, renewal date, and key clauses from executed contracts into the CRM, using tools like Ironclad or LinkSquares.

useCases.title: Silence-as-resolution detector
useCases.summary: A model decides after a defined period of customer silence whether it is safe to auto-close a ticket.

useCases.title: Similar-ticket retrieval
useCases.summary: RAG surfaces top resolved tickets matching the current issue along with their fixes, using tools like Twig or eesel.

useCases.title: Skill-based agent matching
useCases.summary: Embedding search matches ticket content to agent skill profiles built from past resolutions.

useCases.title: Skills inference from work artifacts
useCases.summary: Embeddings on messages, pull requests, and docs derive a live skills graph per employee without self-reporting.

useCases.title: SLA breach prediction
useCases.summary: A time-series model forecasts which tickets are likely to breach SLA and surfaces them early for intervention.

useCases.title: Solution-verification agent
useCases.summary: An agent re-runs the originally failing call, workflow, or test against the customer's account to confirm the fix.

useCases.title: SOX control narrative drafting
useCases.summary: LLM drafts and updates control narratives from process change inputs and prior versions.

useCases.title: Stakeholder/landscape intelligence
useCases.summary: Deep-research agent reads 20-50 external sources to map what peers are scoping toward

useCases.title: Strategic skills gap analysis
useCases.summary: Embeddings cluster current employee skills against roadmap requirements and external market signals to surface build-vs-buy gaps.

useCases.title: Structured one-pager auto-draft
useCases.summary: LLM compiles standard 1-pager per candidate from public and parsed inputs

useCases.title: Structured resume scoring
useCases.summary: LLM rates each decomposed job requirement separately and produces an explainable rubric score per candidate.

useCases.title: Synthetic audience message testing
useCases.summary: LLM personas pre-test positioning and creative against ICP segments before campaign spend.

useCases.title: Synthetic-avatar video ads
useCases.summary: Text-to-video avatars produce localized spokesperson ads without shoots, using tools like HeyGen or Synthesia.

useCases.title: Tax and jurisdiction assignment
useCases.summary: Classifier assigns VAT, sales tax, and withholding codes per region, using tools like Avalara or Stripe Tax.

useCases.title: Theory-of-change generator + validator
useCases.summary: LLM drafts ToC (inputs, activities, outputs, outcomes, assumptions) from candidate brief; validates each link against evidence

useCases.title: Three-way match agent
useCases.summary: Agent matches invoice to PO and goods receipt, auto-posts clean matches, and routes exceptions, using tools like Vic.ai.

useCases.title: Ticket-resolution summarization
useCases.summary: An LLM produces a structured problem-cause-fix summary for the closed ticket record, using tools like Zendesk AI Summary or Kustomer Copilot.

useCases.title: Time tracking
useCases.summary: AI time tracking reconstructs work from apps, websites, files, calendars, and summaries so people can understand where time goes without running manual timers all day.

useCases.title: Tone and policy compliance review
useCases.summary: An adversarial LLM reviews drafted replies for brand voice, empathy, policy adherence, and risky commitments before send.

useCases.title: MCP
useCases.summary: MCP gives AI assistants controlled access to tools, documents, repositories, and work history, turning repeated copy-paste context into scoped integrations.

useCases.title: AI Projects
useCases.summary: AI Projects keep persistent instructions, files, decisions, and context around a workstream so teams do not restart every chat from zero.

useCases.title: AI Skills
useCases.summary: AI Skills package repeated workflows into reusable instructions, references, and operating rules when ad hoc prompting produces inconsistent results.

useCases.title: Variance report with driver attribution
useCases.summary: ML decomposes plan-vs-actual variance into volume, price, and mix drivers with commentary.

useCases.title: Vendor spend benchmark
useCases.summary: Retrieval over peer-rate data flags overpriced contracts during budget review, using tools like Vendr or Tropic.

useCases.title: Vibe scripting
useCases.summary: Vibe scripting uses AI to draft small scripts for spreadsheet or workspace busywork when a lightweight script is faster than a full automation project.

useCases.title: Vibe-coding websites
useCases.summary: Vibe-coding websites uses AI to ship prototypes, simple web apps, and marketing pages from a clear brief, existing design constraints, and a review loop.

useCases.title: Website visitor de-anonymization
useCases.summary: An identity graph reveals which target accounts browse pricing and product pages, using tools like RB2B or Warmly.

useCases.title: Win/loss reason classifier
useCases.summary: AI categorizes closed deals by reason from communications history and updates competitive intel.

useCases.title: Workflow automation
useCases.summary: Workflow automation uses AI or AI-generated code to remove predictable, repetitive work when triggers, inputs, outputs, exceptions, and ownership are clear.

useCases.title: Workload-aware auto-assignment
useCases.summary: An optimization model combines queue depth, shift coverage, and ticket sentiment into assignment decisions, using tools like Zendesk Omnichannel Routing.

useCases.title: Workpaper review LLM
useCases.summary: LLM checks workpapers for completeness, sign-offs, tickmarks, and reference integrity.

useCases.title: Zero-based budget challenger
useCases.summary: LLM probes line owners with structured "why this number" questions and tests justifications.
